title: Adam Bomb applies equipped stat suite

card.rawText: When this card is played, destroy all other magic cards on the field. Atk: +3. Hit: +3. AL: +3. SPD: +3.

plan.title: Adam Bomb applies equipped stat suite
plan.summary: Equip Adam Bomb to a modifier-zero primary creature and verify its printed stat bonuses.

notes: Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 so the bonuses come only from Adam Bomb.

steps: Player 1 plays Adam Bomb and equips it to their primary creature.
Read equipped creature effective AL and SPD.
Run a follow-up battle and inspect Hit and Atk output.

expectedAssertions.label: Attack damage includes the +3 Atk bonus

manualVerification: Confirm the destroy-other-magic sentence is covered separately from this stat-suite assertion.
riskNotes: This fixture covers Adam Bomb's equipped stat effect only.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Adam Bomb's equipped stat bonuses.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
